comments.title: Crossing visibility is still poor at school dismissal
comments.body: Parents report that parked cars and turning traffic still hide children at dismissal time. This should remain public because it explains why daylighting is being proposed here.
comments.review_notes: Reviewed for public safety relevance and stripped of personally identifying details.

comments.title: Photo location needs stronger source support before publication
comments.body: The memory photo set is valuable, but the street-facing orientation still needs a second source before the precise building outline is public.
comments.review_notes: Keep inside review queue until corroborated imagery or parcel evidence is attached.

comments.title: Residents asked for block-level phasing explanation
comments.body: A grouped note should explain why this service-line replacement package is sequenced as one cluster instead of one home at a time.
comments.review_notes: Candidate explanatory note; public after copy review.

comments.title: Safe routes scenario should expose a parent-friendly summary
comments.body: If the scenario goes public, pair the technical metrics with a short summary explaining school dismissal changes in plain language.
